description_long: This is a pair of athletic sneakers featuring a bold red and light gray color scheme. The shoes have a low-top design with a rounded toe and prominent paneling, including reinforced toe caps and heel counters. The upper is primarily constructed from synthetic material with visible stitching and multiple overlays, while the sides display a series of decorative and functional elements, such as ventilation holes and embossed branding. The lacing system consists of standard criss-cross laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets, and the tongue and heel both feature a circular logo. The outsole appears to be made of durable rubber, with a visible air pocket in the midsole for added cushioning. The back of the shoes displays the word 'GHOUL' in bold white letters, indicating a possible brand or model name.
description: A pair of red and gray athletic sneakers with criss-cross laces, reinforced toe and heel, and 'GHOUL' branding on the back. The shoes feature synthetic uppers, rubber soles, and visible logo details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded red toe caps, criss-cross laces, and circular logos on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered panel construction, ventilation holes, and visible air pocket in the midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'GHOUL' branding in white on the gray heel counters and the overall heel structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the same paneling, lacing, and air pocket details.
attribute_logo: Circular logo on tongue and side, white color
